name: Chicken Breasts with Prosciutto and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 8 slices Fontina or Bel Paese cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts in half and pound lightly.
2. Mix flour, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish.
3. Dredge the chicken in the seasoned flour.
4. Heat oil and butter in a pan over medium heat.
5. Add chicken to the pan and sauté quickly until golden brown on both sides.
6. Transfer chicken to a buttered baking dish.
7. Arrange prosciutto slices and cheese slices on top of the chicken.
8. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese and chicken stock evenly over all ingredients.
9. Bake uncovered for ten minutes, or until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
